text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today, I go see Maruzensky during her dance practice, and...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: One, two, and... finish! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's only just learned this number, but pulls it off masterfully.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That felt good! This upbeat song is my jam. ♪ My body gets
into the rhythm so naturally.
choice_data_list: It was fun just watching you.
It was fun just watching you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You've got that gleam in your eyes... just like when we first met.
Hehe, it makes me laugh.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You've got that gleam in your eyes... just like when we first met.
Hehe, it makes me laugh.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I'm happy you enjoyed it! "Have fun" has become our little motto,
hasn't it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Whether dancing or racing, it's all about having fun while you do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding, dong, ding, dong...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's this late already? Guess we're done for today then. Plus I
gotta get going.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What, feeling jealous? Don't worry—it's not a date or anything!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Actually, there's this car expo going on... And!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They're giving out miniature cars, including Tata's model! They're
super cute! I want one sooo bad.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The giveaway starts at 7, but it's a limited edition, so I gotta hurry
there!
choice_data_list: You'd better get there fast then.
You'd better get there fast then.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Right, sorry to rush off like this. I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Right, sorry to rush off like this. I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Maruzen! I'm so glad to see you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, hey, kiddos! What's shaking?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: You were just doing dance practice, right?! We really wanna see your moves!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Our instructor said your dancing's so beautiful it'd be great to learn
from... So, please! Pretty please!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well... Hehe, I can't say no when you ask so nicely, can I? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, there's no substitute for their cute little smiles. All right, get
ready, 'cause here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky decides to continue her dance practice for the younger
students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Remembering how excited for the expo she was, I look up the event
and head over to get a miniature for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Another great day for training. ♪ I'm all set! What's first on the menu?
choice_data_list: Before we start, I have something for you.
Before we start, I have something for you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hold the miniature car up to Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wha! Wait, you didn't... Did you go to the show for me?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wha! Wait, you didn't... Did you go to the show for me?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wasn't it far? And you must have waited so long in line.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's all 'cause I wouldn't shut up about it. I'm so sorry you had to
go all the way there...
choice_data_list: Nah, I just wanted to make you happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's all 'cause I wouldn't shut up about it. I'm so sorry you had to
go all the way there...
choice_data_list: Nah, I just wanted to make you happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aw, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aw, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, you did! I'm as happy as can be! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay! What are you doing after training? I need to return the favor
for the miniature.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Get ready to have some mad fun. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After training, Maruzensky and I go for a drive in her prized car.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cool night's breeze blowing in our hair, the occasional close call...
This is quite the mad ride.
